name: What to expect at a workers comp hearing in Holladay?

mainEntity.name: What to expect at a workers comp hearing in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.description: Testimony under oath: your story, cross-exam by insurer, witnesses; judge decides.[4][7] No jury; complex cases need attorney.[7] Key factors: medical history, job details ready. Practice answers.[4] Representation evens odds.
